decisions: Shift to web-first app (Next.js). Electron is overkill; keep runtime lightweight and browser-based.
Treat tools as standalone services with stable contracts; Synthesis Workbench is the central integrator with Stage1 Inspector and OODS Foundry MCP as independent peers.

Zustand stores follow consistent pattern: phase-state, token-state, stage1-bundle, preview. All use subscribeWithSelector middleware. Store actions are synchronous; async operations happen in tools/adapters.
Tool commands follow /<name> pattern: /tool, /phase, /review, /tokens, /bundle, /render. Each has corresponding tool UI via makeAssistantToolUI. withToolCommands handles parsing and result summaries.
MCP clients use JSON-RPC transport with singleton accessor pattern (getStage1Client, getFoundryClient). Env vars for server endpoints in .env.local.
Preview state store manages rendered HTML separate from TokenState. PreviewPanel in chat layout for inline display.
constraints: Each stage must function independently while interoperating through file-based or MCP contracts; avoid tight coupling between tools.
learnings: makeAssistantToolUI pattern established as standard for tool UI components. Registry maps tool names to React components with type-safe props.
ToolOutputCard shared component pattern for consistent tool UI styling. Supports title, status, body, and action slots.
withToolCommands pattern enables slash commands that are testable and integrate cleanly with runtime adapter layer.
TokenState store uses nested path access (e.g., 'colors.primary') with getNestedValue/setNestedValue helpers. toCssVariables() flattens to --colors-primary format.
PreviewPane uses iframe with srcdoc injection - no WebContainers or Sandpack needed. CSS variables injected into :root, sandbox='allow-scripts' for security.
PostMessage bridge: parent sends TOKEN_STATE_UPDATE and COMPONENT_UPDATE; iframe inject-script updates CSS variables without page reload. PREVIEW_READY confirms listening.
Stage1 bundle ingestion extracts component detections and token suggestions from style fingerprint. Bundle store supports seeding TokenState.

Stage1 fingerprint parsing: Extract colors from colors.text[].value and colors.background[].value, fonts from type_scale.font_families[].value, spacing from spacing_scale.padding/margin[].px. Items with token:true flag are prioritized.
MCP client pattern: JSON-RPC transport with callTool(name, args). Normalize responses, handle timeout/network/missing errors. Singleton accessor for shared instances.
Bundle loading: bundle-loader helper fetches report-index.json first for artifact paths, falls back to direct artifact names. BundlePicker groups runs by hostname.
RenderComponentTool flow: LLM calls render_component -> Workbench proxies to Foundry repl.render -> HTML stored in Preview store -> PreviewPane receives COMPONENT_UPDATE via postMessage.

fileStructure.stores: src/lib/stores/ - Zustand stores (phase-state, token-state, stage1-bundle, preview)
fileStructure.tools: src/lib/runtime/tools/ - tool contracts (phase-tools, token-tools, oods-tools, stage1-tools)

keyInterfaces: TokenState (src/types/token-state.ts) - design token structure with DEFAULT_TOKEN_STATE

stage1-enhancements.resolution: All 3 requests fully implemented in Stage1. token-guess.json (v1.0.0) with dot-path tokens, manifest.json project_id with auto-generation fallback, component_clusters.json (v1.1.0) with confidence/selectors/nesting/variants. Artifacts tracked in report-index.json.

nextSteps: Sprint 05: End-to-end workflow testing (bundle -> tokens -> render)
ValidateSchemaTool for LLM schema validation before render
Export workflow for final token/component artifacts
Phase state enforcement with tool availability per phase
Verify Workbench bundle-loader ingests new Stage1 artifacts (token-guess.json, component_clusters.json) correctly

sprintHistory.sprint-01: Foundation & Core Chat - project scaffold, chat UI, Ollama/Anthropic adapters
sprintHistory.sprint-02: Tool UI Infrastructure - makeAssistantToolUI, ToolOutputCard, PhaseTransitionTool, ReviewGateTool
sprintHistory.sprint-03: State & Live Preview - TokenState store, PreviewPane, postMessage bridge, TokenAdjustmentTool, Stage1 bundle ingestion
sprintHistory.sprint-04: OODS Deep Integration - Stage1 contract alignment, MCP clients (Stage1 + Foundry), BundlePicker UI, RenderComponentTool proxy, Stage1 enhancement spec
